reasoning: The 538 brand was officially shut down by Disney/ABC News in March 2025 during a round of layoffs. Disney explicitly stated that any future polling and data analysis would continue outside of the 538 brand identity, and the website itself was decommissioned. Since then, there have been no credible market rumors about Disney selling or spinning off the name, nor the site being revived by someone else. Given that the knowledge cutoff is in November 2025, there are only weeks left in the year for such a transaction to be brokered, finalized, and a resulting site/IP deployed. The market value on October 30, 2025 was 0.02. Because the timeline is incredibly short and there is zero evidence of a revival currently underway, I share this high degree of skepticism and predict 2%.
